consumption-ack.reason: claude's one-way notifications/claude/channel has NO native consumption confirm; backstop chain = PollBackstop dedup-aware re-delivery + claim_message + ack_message-on-action + L3 -> at-least-once-with-dedup at the channel, NOT exactly-once-at-the-LLM (P1d). (opencode awaitable session.promptAsync = yes.)

tools-list-changed-honored.reason: claude-code 2.1.195 does NOT act on mid-session notifications/tools/list_changed (bug-203, host/upstream limitation, not adapter-fixable); the adapter emits correctly. Workaround = clear .ois tool-catalog + plugin cache + restart at the harness-container layer. (opencode honors it = yes.)

notification-coalescer.reason: claude wires notification hooks directly with no coalescer. (opencode paces via NotificationCoalescer = yes.)
